title: 🔴LIVE - What's Next for Archon - Live Roadmap Session
summary: Cole Medin held a live streaming session to discuss the future roadmap and development priorities for Archon. The session invited community questions and ideas for the project's direction. Archon is a software project hosted on GitHub.
